response.step_by_step_log: Detected two songs via on-screen text. Song 1: 'ETERNAL BLAZE' by Nana Mizuki, performed by Omaru Polka. Song 2: '星天ギャラクシィクロス' (on-screen text: 星天ギャラクシィクロニクル), performed by Omaru Polka & Shiranui Flare. Searched for Japanese/English lyrics for both songs using DuckDuckGo. Lyrics for ETERNAL BLAZE confirmed from standard sources. Lyrics for 星天ギャラクシィクロス (original by Polka/Flare) confirmed via Hololive 3D live context searches.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Hololive VTuber Omaru Polka's birthday live 2026. The video includes a performance of Nana Mizuki's 'ETERNAL BLAZE', followed by a short talking segment, and concludes with a performance of '星天ギャラクシィクロス' by Omaru Polka and Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: Omaru Polka performs ETERNAL BLAZE on stage surrounded by virtual flames. Text ETERNAL BLAZE appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遥か天空響いている 祈りは奇跡に
真夜中の蒼に溶けて流れてく涙の粒
迷いなく包み込む温もりに出逢った
真っ白な雪のようにどこまでも素直なコトバ
鉄の羽根纏った 僕を動かしてく
傷つくたびに 優しくなれる
君のその笑顔だけ守り抜きたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Even in the traces of fallen tears, melting into the midnight blue, I met a warmth that wrapped around me without hesitation. Like pure white snow, your honest words move me, wearing iron wings. Every time I get hurt, I become kinder; I want to protect that smile of yours.

scenes.description: Talking segment where Omaru Polka introduces the concert and the next guest.
Omaru Polka and Shiranui Flare perform 星天ギャラクシィクロス on a colorful, star-themed stage. Text 星天ギャラクシィクロニクル appears in the bottom.
scenes.song_title: 星天ギャラクシィクロス
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ヒカリトシブキノキス
虹のように咲かせよう
恋のような
虹のバステイ
どんな美しい日も
何かが生まれる 何かが死ぬ
せめて歌を
I love you
世界がひどい地獄だとしても
せめて伝えよう
I love you
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: A kiss of light and spray, like a rainbow, let's bloom. Even if this world is a hellish one, let's keep singing. 'I love you', even if it sounds like a lie, tell it to the world. A kiss of light and spray...
